Never Ask "What to Cook?" Again

MealCoreAI builds your personalised weekly meal plan for PCOS, Diabetes, Thyroid, Pregnancy, or your Kids — based on your region, health conditions, and favourite foods.

🏥PCOS · Diabetes · Thyroid · Pregnancy · Kids

From Sign-Up to Meal Plan in 2 Minutes

Three simple steps. No guesswork. No dietitian appointment needed.

⚡1

Tell us about yourself

A 90-second onboarding covers your health condition, region, diet type, family size, and how much time you have to cook each day.

🤖2

Get your AI-powered weekly plan

Our GPT-4 powered engine instantly generates a 7-day Indian meal plan — personalised to your health track, preferences, and schedule.

✅3

Cook with confidence — swap, lock, repeat

Follow your plan, lock meals you love, swap ones you don't. Regenerate each week. Your plan improves the more you use it.

Built for Your Specific Health Condition

MealCoreAI understands the dietary requirements of each condition — so every meal works for your body, not against it.

🌸

PCOS

Hormone-friendly, low-GI Indian meals that reduce insulin resistance

See PCOS Plans
💙

Diabetes

Low-GI, high-fibre meals for stable blood sugar all day

See Diabetes Plans
🦋

Thyroid

Selenium and iodine-rich Indian food for thyroid support

See Thyroid Plans
🤰

Pregnancy

Trimester-wise nutrition with iron, folate, and calcium

See Pregnancy Plans
🧒

Kids

Nutrient-dense tiffin and dinner ideas for ages 2–12

See Kids Plans
❤️

Cholesterol

Heart-healthy, low-saturated-fat Indian meals rich in omega-3

See Cholesterol Plans

Everything You Need to Eat Well Every Day

From AI meal generation to grocery lists and push reminders — every tool you need in one app.

AI-Generated Weekly Plan

Get a personalised 7-day plan in seconds — breakfast, lunch, snack, and dinner — tuned by GPT-4 for your exact health needs.

Daily Meal Reminders

Push notifications at breakfast, lunch, and dinner — with your actual dish name so you never forget to cook.

Grocery List

One tap turns your meal plan into an organised grocery list with exact quantities — ready to share on WhatsApp.

Nutrition Tracking

See calories, protein, calcium, and fibre for every meal with a real-time daily progress bar — no manual entry.

Regional Cuisine

North Indian, South Indian, Maharashtrian, Bengali, Gujarati — your region, your flavours, every single week.

Swap and Lock

Love today's dal? Lock it in. Want something different? Swap any meal instantly — the AI adapts around your choices.

Real People, Real Results

"I've had PCOS for 4 years and tried every diet. MealCoreAI finally gave me a plan that makes sense — South Indian food I already love, but properly balanced for my hormones. My cycles are more regular after 3 months."

P
Priya S.
Bangalore
🌸 PCOS

"My HbA1c dropped from 8.2 to 6.9 in four months. The app generates low-GI South Indian meals that fit my routine exactly. The grocery list saves my wife an hour every Sunday."

R
Ramesh K.
Chennai
💙 Diabetes

"My gynaecologist was impressed with my haemoglobin levels at week 28. MealCoreAI made sure I got iron and folate every day through food I actually enjoyed. Highly recommend for expecting mothers."

Mumbai
